creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue Jul 16 05:46:30 2013
New Revision: 323093
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323093

Log:
  - Update to 1.4
  
  PR:		180561
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/bsd.port.netdisco.mk   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/files/mkindex   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 05:45:38 2013	(r323092)
+++ head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 05:46:30 2013	(r323093)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	netdisco-mibs
-PORTVERSION=	1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.4
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/netdisco/netdisco-mibs/${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -16,7 +16,6 @@ NO_BUILD=	yes
 do-install:
 	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
 	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${DATADIR})
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${FILESDIR}/mkindex ${DATADIR}
 .	for mibdir in ${MIBDIRS}
 		(cd ${DATADIR}/${mibdir} && ${GREP} 'DEFINITIONS ::= BEGIN' *.* | ${SED} 's/\(.*\..*\):[[:space:]]*\(.*\) DEFINITIONS.*$$/\2 \1/' > .index)
 .	endfor

Modified: head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/bsd.port.netdisco.mk
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/bsd.port.netdisco.mk	Tue Jul 16 05:45:38 2013	(r323092)
+++ head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/bsd.port.netdisco.mk	Tue Jul 16 05:46:30 2013	(r323093)
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 MIBDIRS=	allied \
+		alcatel \
 		arista \
 		aruba \
 		asante \

+++ head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/distinfo	Tue Jul 16 05:46:30 2013	(r323093)

+SHA256 (netdisco-mibs-1.4.tar.gz) = 45f040525a9c17d02cdd93bd9588d371ef9ddbb40189db6621ba35f775d7932f
+SIZE (netdisco-mibs-1.4.tar.gz) = 19359305

Modified: head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/files/mkindex
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/files/mkindex	Tue Jul 16 05:45:38 2013	(r323092)
+++ head/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/files/mkindex	Tue Jul 16 05:46:30 2013	(r323093)
@@ -1,27 +0,0 @@
-#!/bin/sh
-# mkindex - Makes index of MIBS
-# $Id$
-FILE=mib_index.txt
-export LC_ALL=C
-
-echo "Creating $FILE"
-
-echo "MIB Index" > $FILE
-
-# refresh index files
-for d in `find -L . -mindepth 1 -type d -not -name CVS | grep -v .git | sort`; do
-    snmptranslate -M$d sysName > /dev/null 2>&1
-done
-
-# sort contents of index files
-for i in `find -L . -mindepth 1 -type f -name .index`; do
-    sort -dfs -o $i $i
-done
-
-# Add contents of each .index to our index
-for f in `find -L . -name .index | sort`; do
-    echo "" >> $FILE
-    echo $f >> $FILE
-    cat $f  >> $FILE
-    echo "" >> $FILE
-done
